board_policy.title: Vendor commitment board notification
board_policy.text: Any single vendor commitment above $150K annualized, any material runway movement, or any commitment touching customer or regulated data requires board notification before signing.
required_evidence: Data-sensitivity appendix when customer or regulated data is in scope
board_policy.exception_process: CFO may log an urgent-signing exception only if the board is notified within 2 business days and the exception is included in the next audit packet.
audit_requirements: Retain notification memo and delivery timestamp
Attach final contract value and approval route

board_policy.title: Vendor competitive review value
board_policy.text: Vendor contracts over $100,000 per year must be competitively reviewed before renewal or extension.
board_policy.exception_process: Procurement may request a sole-source exception with CFO sign-off and a documented benchmark.
audit_requirements: Retain benchmark source and negotiation log
Record renewal decision before notice window closes

board_policy.title: Vendor competitive review window
board_policy.text: High-value vendor contracts must be competitively reviewed at least 60 days before their renewal date and before any auto-renewal notice deadline.
board_policy.exception_process: If the 60-day window is missed, Procurement must escalate renewal urgency to the CFO and document the lost leverage.
audit_requirements: Track notice deadline in the renewal calendar
Attach owner attestation after contract-owner changes

evidence_required: Filed notice or signed renewal decision

board_policy.title: Minimum runway guardrail
board_policy.text: Maintain at least 9 months runway unless a signed financing term sheet is in hand or the board grants a runway exception with named mitigations.
required_evidence: Signed financing term sheet or board exception
board_policy.exception_process: Board-approved exception must name financing owner, closing date, and trigger-based spend reductions.
audit_requirements: Archive runway model with source cash forecast
Log exception or financing term sheet in the governance audit stream

board_policy.title: Headcount funding basis
board_policy.text: New headcount must map to signed revenue, security compliance, or runway-positive automation and must not push monthly net-burn growth above the approved cap without CFO exception.
board_policy.exception_process: CFO may approve a staged-start exception if the owner documents the business linkage and burn sensitivity.
audit_requirements: Reconcile planned, open, filled, contractor, and backfill roles monthly
Retain approval status and department mapping

board_policy.title: Customer and regulated data vendor review
board_policy.text: Any vendor or workflow that processes customer or regulated data requires security review, Legal review when regulated data is in scope, and a signed data processing agreement before go-live.
required_evidence: Fresh SOC 2 or equivalent security evidence
board_policy.exception_process: No go-live exception is permitted for regulated data without both Legal and Security Review approval.
audit_requirements: Store DPA, security review, data-flow owner, and access grant evidence
Reconcile vendor security evidence freshness before access

board_policy.title: Post-decision forecast calibration
board_policy.text: Every material council decision must compare predicted cash, ARR, margin, and control outcomes against actuals within 60 days and feed misses into replay cases.
board_policy.exception_process: CFO must approve skipping calibration and record why actuals cannot be measured.
audit_requirements: Attach prompt or process improvement directive when calibration misses exceed tolerance
